title: Galosphere Spellbooks
description: An addon for Galosphere and Iron's Spells and Spellbooks
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5861553ced3f1e769767f51d677d4f82a07c842.png)

## **Description:**

Galosphere Spellbooks is an addon between Galosphere and Iron's Spellbooks adding new content and patching incompatabilties. 

Currently this mod adds new spellbooks, a new armor set, crafting recipes and a new necklace item!

This mod is still new and being developed feedback is appreciated!

## **Curseforge Page:**

 [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/galosphere-spellbooks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/galosphere-spellbooks)
